stonetop.summary: The town watch of Marshedge — Brennan's old gang, the Claws, in all but name.

system.concept: The town watch of Marshedge — Brennan's old gang, the Claws, in all but name.
system.description: The town watch of Marshedge, dominated by Brennan's old gang, the Claws. Whether a given guard protects the town or preys on it depends entirely on which sort you've crossed: an Ex-Claw out to lord over others, a Loyalist who'll protect the town no matter what, or a green New recruit just trying to avoid danger and punishment.
